rendered_sections.title: Base Runtime Instructions
rendered_sections.content:
GraphBench runtime. Stay bounded, typed, and evidence-oriented.

## UCL Command Reference

## Rules
1. Output ONLY the UCL command(s), no explanations or markdown
2. Use exact block IDs as provided
3. String values must be quoted with double quotes
4. Block IDs have format: blk_XXXXXXXXXXXX (12 hex chars)
5. Do NOT use operators like + for string concatenation - just provide the full value
6. Responses must be schema-valid.

rendered_sections.title: Response Contract
rendered_sections.content: Return JSON only with this exact shape: {"kind":"think|tool_call|complete","prompt_version":"v1","model_slug":"<provider model id>","provider":"<provider slug>","assistant_message":"<brief status>","tool_call":{"tool_name":"<one registered tool name>","payload":{}},"acquired_fact_ids":["<fact id>"],"readiness_state":"not_ready|evidence_visible|evidence_acquired|ready_to_edit"}. Use null or omit tool_call unless kind is tool_call. When kind is tool_call, tool_call.tool_name must exactly match one of the registered tool names shown below. Do not invent helper tools, verifier tools, or meta tools.

rendered_sections.content: Return JSON only with this exact shape: {"kind":"think|tool_call|complete","prompt_version":"v1","model_slug":"<provider model id>","provider":"<provider slug>","assistant_message":"<brief status>","tool_call":{"tool_name":"<one registered tool name>","payload":{}},"acquired_fact_ids":["<fact id>"],"readiness_state":"not_ready|evidence_visible|evidence_acquired|ready_to_edit"}. Use null or omit tool_call unless kind is tool_call. When kind is tool_call, tool_call.tool_name must exactly match one of the registered tool names shown below. Do not invent helper tools, verifier tools, or meta tools.

rendered_sections.title: Objective State
rendered_sections.content:
Task: Gather the exact evidence needed before editing schema definitions so fixture, task, evidence, trace, score, and run artifacts stay versioned and aligned.
Class: prepare_to_edit
Allowed Tools:
read_file
list_dir
search
Verification Targets:
command: cargo test --workspace
